title: Algorithmic position
subtitle: An X-ray of your place inside the Spotify algorithm: where your recommendation streams come from, and how to earn more.
subtitleLabel: Roster algorithmic health: who the algorithm is pushing, who it is starting to forget.

sources.title: Where your algorithmic share comes from
sources.description: The algorithm drives {share}% of your streams, spread across 5 recommendation surfaces. Each one is grown differently.

discoverWeekly.name: Discover Weekly
discoverWeekly.hint: Monday's personalized playlist, aimed at listeners who don't know you yet — a high save rate on your recent tracks widens its reach.

releaseRadar.name: Release Radar
releaseRadar.hint: Your new releases pushed to your followers every Friday — every Spotify follower gained before release day directly grows this audience.

radio.name: Radio
radio.hint: Stations generated from a similar track or artist — it kicks in once your save rate stays above ~30% over time.

autoplay.name: Autoplay
autoplay.hint: Automatic playback after a playlist or album ends — a low skip rate keeps your tracks in these queues.

dailyMix.name: Daily Mix
dailyMix.hint: Daily mixes of your regular listeners — fed by repeat listening: the more your fans come back, the more you appear.

mix.title: Source evolution · 90 days
mix.description: Share of streams coming from the algorithm, editorial playlists and organic listening (search, library, profile).

signals.title: Signals
signals.rrBody: Your Release Radar share jumped +{pct}% in the 28 days after “{title}” dropped. Capitalize with a single within 8 weeks.
signals.saveAbove: Your save rate of {rate}% is above the ~{threshold}% threshold that triggers Radio: your tracks now run in automatic stations.
signals.saveBelow: Your save rate of {rate}% is {missing} pt short of the ~30% threshold that triggers Radio. A save call-to-action at the end of a clip or story can be enough.
signals.dwAbove: Discover Weekly drives {share}% of your streams, {diff} pt above the roster average: the algorithm is testing you with new audiences.
signals.dwBelow: Discover Weekly only drives {share}% of your streams ({diff} pt below the roster average). Pre-saves and playlist pitching before release revive this channel.
signals.completionGood: {rate}% of your plays run to the end of the track: a strong quality signal the algorithm rewards by widening your recommendations.
signals.completionLow: Only {rate}% of your plays run to the end of the track. Shorter intros and a hook before the 30-second mark improve this signal.

perception.title: How the algorithm sees you
perception.description: The three engagement signals Spotify measures on every play — they decide whether the algorithm pushes you.
perception.saveRateHint: Share of listeners adding the track to their library — above ~{threshold}%, Radio kicks in.
perception.skipRateHint: Share of plays skipped before 30 seconds — staying under ~{threshold}% protects your Autoplay presence.
perception.completionHint: Share of plays running to the end — above ~{threshold}%, the track is “retained” and recommended more widely.
perception.note: Values estimated from your demo streams. In production these signals will come from Spotify for Artists — the thresholds shown are observed orders of magnitude, not official rules.

roster.title: Roster algo health
roster.description: Health score, algorithmic share and 28-day trend per artist — click to open the full X-ray.
